data.title: What's Going On With Phillips 66 Stock Today?
data.description: On October 16, 2024, a jury awarded Propel Fuels Inc. $604.9 million in damages in a trade secret misappropriation lawsuit against Phillips 66 Company, which denies wrongdoing and plans to appeal.

data.title: Alibaba And JD.com Ease Rivalry, Share Logistics In Response To Economic Challenges
data.description: Alibaba and Chinese hyperscalar rivals are opening their walled gardens to each other, with Alibaba allowing JD.com to provide logistics services on its platforms to combat economic weakness.

data.title: Blackstone Exceeds Q3 Expectations: $1.108T AUM, Achieves Highest Amount Of Fund Appreciation In 3 Years
data.description: Blackstone reports Q3 results with segment revenues of $2.434 billion, DE of $1.279 billion, and AUM of $1.108 trillion. Stock up 51% in past year.

data.title: Tesla Promotes Key Executives And Gives Them More Responsibilities In Leadership Shuffle
data.description: Several Tesla executives, including Wes Morrill, Milan Kovac, and Ashok Elluswamy, have received promotions over the past few weeks.

data.title: 12 Industrials Stocks Moving In Thursday's Pre-Market Session
